task_completion.description: Create 'STONE' and 'CUTOUTS' layers with correct colors
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the LibreCAD Layer List panel, there should be a layer named 'STONE' with a cyan color indicator and a layer named 'CUTOUTS' with a red color indicator.
The main canvas displays an L-shaped polygon. The horizontal bottom leg should appear longer than the vertical left leg, and both legs should have the same thickness.

task_completion.description: Profile is drawn on the STONE layer (Cyan)
task_completion.visual_evidence: The lines forming the L-shaped profile on the canvas are cyan in color.
The internal corner of the L-shape (where the inside edges of the two legs meet) is visibly rounded with a fillet, rather than a sharp 90-degree angle.
Two rectangles are visible inside the L-shape: a wider rectangle in the horizontal leg (sink) and a square rectangle in the vertical leg (cooktop).

task_completion.description: Cutouts are drawn on the CUTOUTS layer (Red)
task_completion.visual_evidence: The lines forming the two cutout rectangles on the canvas are red in color.
The LibreCAD window title bar or a save dialog shows the filename 'countertop.dxf'.

integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the LibreCAD interface being used to draw the shapes, either via toolbar buttons or the internal LibreCAD command line.

integrity.description: Agent did not write DXF code manually
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should not be seen writing raw DXF format text in a text editor or terminal.
Screenshots should show intermediate steps of the drawing process (e.g., creating layers, drawing lines, adding fillets) rather than the final file instantly appearing.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires drawing an L-shaped countertop in LibreCAD. Outer dimensions: 3000mm (X) by 2400mm (Y), depth 600mm. Internal corner at (600,600) must have a 50mm radius fillet. Layers required: 'STONE' (Cyan) for the profile and 'CUTOUTS' (Red) for cutouts. Cutouts: 800x450mm sink centered at (1500,300) and 500x500mm cooktop centered at (300,1500). Final file: 'countertop.dxf'.
